visual_description:
The audio is dominated by a high-energy, fast-paced electronic music track. A driving, percussive beat and a pulsating bassline create a sense of urgency and suspense, building a tense and dramatic atmosphere. The video opens with a medium close-up of a bald man with a graying goatee, shown in profile. He is wearing a dark, possibly corduroy, jacket. He gazes intently at a row of aquariums to his right. The setting is dimly lit with a cool, blueish-green color palette. The aquariums are on a shelf, and the water inside is dark, with some aquatic plants visible. In the top right corner, a watermark with the Chinese characters "风行网" is visible. The camera slowly pans to the right, following the man's gaze, and then cuts to a slightly different angle as he turns his head to look directly toward the camera with a serious, focused expression. The background remains the same, with the aquariums and a dark, out-of-focus environment. There is no dialogue or narration in the audio.
